query_title: Miraculous World: Paris, Tales of Shadybug and Claw Noir

recommendations.title: Miraculous World: Shanghai - The Legend of Ladydragon
recommendations.overview: On school break, Marinette heads to Shanghai to meet Adrien. But after arriving, Marinette loses all her stuff, including the Miraculous that allows her to turn into Ladybug!

recommendations.title: Miraculous World: London, At the Edge of Time
recommendations.overview: To save the future from a terrible fate, Marinette becomes Chronobug and teams up with Bunnyx to defeat a mysterious opponent who travels through time.

recommendations.title: Miraculous World: New York, United HeroeZ
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, TV Movie, Action, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Marinette’s class is headed to New York, the city of superheroes, for French-American Friendship Week.

recommendations.title: The Green Mile

recommendations.title: Flow
recommendations.overview: A solitary cat, displaced by a great flood, finds refuge on a boat with various species and must navigate the challenges of adapting to a transformed world together.

recommendations.title: Barbie Mariposa

recommendations.title: The Bad Guys
recommendations.overview: When the Bad Guys, a crew of criminal animals, are finally caught after years of heists and being the world’s most-wanted villains, Mr. Wolf brokers a deal to save them all from prison.

recommendations.title: Roald Dahl's Matilda the Musical

recommendations.title: The Cat Returns
recommendations.overview: Young Haru rescues a cat from being run over, but soon learns it's no ordinary feline; it happens to be the Prince of the Cats.

recommendations.title: Three from Prostokvashino
recommendations.overview: Little Fedor brings a cat to home despite his mother's distaste for cats. He runs away with his talking cat, to make more friends on the way.
